name: agent-rpg
description: Theme and agent tooling for Agent RPG

scripts.ops:check: npm run lint:themes:strict && npm run categories:check && npm run themes:immersion && npm run agents:check && npm run agents:smoke && npm run repo-prep:check && npm run readme:check
scripts.ops:fix: npm run readme:themes && npm run lint:themes && npm run categories:check && npm run agents:check && npm run agents:smoke && npm run repo-prep:check
scripts.ops:check:strict: npm run lint:themes:strict && npm run categories:check && npm run themes:immersion && npm run agents:check:strict && npm run agents:smoke && npm run repo-prep:check && npm run readme:check
